findings: Unrelated dirty work requires precise staging.
TASK-0085 should remain active because closeout proof is incomplete.
evidence-quality.next_action: Use the ticket board state as the source of truth for remaining work.

ai_agent_misunderstanding_risks: A future agent may see the archived TASK-0087 and continue editing it as active work. The ticket now has phase `complete`, status `done`, ready `false`, and an archive path.
A future agent may close approval-gated planning tickets just to reduce the active board. Those tickets should remain visible until approved, explicitly retired, or superseded.
A future agent may delete or shrink the colored Mermaid maps during docs cleanup. README and ARCHITECTURE now state that those maps must be preserved unless replaced with an equally complete map.
A future agent may update README without ARCHITECTURE, or vice versa. The documentation-router sync rule now requires them to move together when public workflow claims change.
A future agent may claim the repo is fully clean because TASK-0087 is archived. TASK-0085 is still a real active cleanup ticket with blockers.
next_action: Commit the documentation-router and TASK-0087 archive slice; leave TASK-0085 and approval-gated tickets active.
